rules.title: Limit source line length
rules.rationale_summary: Excessive line length harms readability and reviewability.
rules.recommendation: Wrap or refactor long lines to improve readability and reviewability.

rules.title: Avoid trailing whitespace
rules.rationale_summary: Trailing whitespace introduces noisy diffs and formatting inconsistency.
rules.recommendation: Remove trailing spaces and enforce formatting checks in CI.

rules.title: Function-like macro usage review
rules.rationale_summary: Function-like macros can introduce side effects and hidden behavior.
rules.recommendation: Replace function-like macro with inline/static function where feasible.

rules.title: Avoid tab characters
rules.rationale_summary: Tabs reduce formatting consistency across tools.
rules.recommendation: Replace tabs with spaces according to project formatting policy.

rules.title: Review direct printf usage
rules.rationale_summary: Direct stdio usage may violate project logging and determinism policies.
rules.recommendation: Use project logging abstraction instead of direct printf in production paths.

rules.title: Avoid assignment in controlling expressions
rules.rationale_summary: Assignments in conditions can hide defects and unintended control flow.
rules.recommendation: Separate assignment from condition expressions to make intent explicit.

rules.title: Avoid C-style casts
rules.rationale_summary: C-style casts may hide unsafe or narrowing conversions.
rules.recommendation: Prefer explicit C++ cast forms and verify narrowing/safety semantics.

rules.title: Use braces for control statements
rules.rationale_summary: Mandatory braces reduce ambiguity and maintenance defects in control flow.
rules.recommendation: Use explicit braces for if/for/while bodies, including single-statement blocks.

rules.title: Avoid direct floating-point equality comparison
rules.rationale_summary: Exact float comparisons are fragile due to representation and rounding effects.
rules.recommendation: Replace direct float equality checks with epsilon/threshold-based comparisons.

rules.title: Avoid goto
rules.rationale_summary: Unstructured jumps can reduce analyzability and maintainability.
rules.recommendation: Refactor control flow to structured constructs (if/while/for/function extraction).

rules.title: Recursion usage review
rules.rationale_summary: Recursion can challenge bounded stack/resource analysis.
rules.recommendation: Refactor recursive logic to iterative form for bounded-stack behavior.

rules.title: Review magic numbers
rules.rationale_summary: Unnamed numeric literals can hide intent and complicate safe maintenance.
rules.recommendation: Replace raw literals with named constants or strongly typed enum values.

rules.title: Review multiple return statements
rules.rationale_summary: Multiple returns may increase control-flow complexity in safety-critical code.
rules.recommendation: Prefer a single structured function exit where practical and review exceptions.

rules.title: Terminate switch clauses explicitly
rules.rationale_summary: Missing clause terminators can introduce unintended fallthrough behavior.
rules.recommendation: Terminate each switch clause with break/return/throw or explicit documented fallthrough.

rules.title: Prefer default clause in switch
rules.rationale_summary: A default clause improves logical completeness and defensive behavior.
rules.recommendation: Add a defensive default clause to switch statements and document expected handling.
